jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Specsmakers
jsonLd.description:
Join the Specsmakers family as a SEO Specialist in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Specsmakers:
Specsmakers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Specsmakers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
